name: stage2-rvv-f32-clamp-select-executable-abi-closure
title: Stage2 RVV f32 clamp/select executable ABI closure
description: Close executable ABI correctness for existing Stage2 RVV f32 clamp/select route with generated bundle dry run and ssh rvv evidence.
creator: codex
notes: Executable closure completed for existing Stage2 RVV f32 clamp/select route. Added neutral generated-bundle ABI harness/evidence support and testing contract; no production compiler C++/TableGen code changed. Dry-run and ssh rvv compile/run evidence passed for counts 0,1,16,17,257; patterns 0,1; bound pairs [-1.5,2.25] and [-8.0,-0.75]; f32 tolerance 1e-05; source and tail sentinel preservation.
